title: Quarterly Expense Review
description: Review Q2 expense reports and flag any irregularities.

title: Vendor Statement Reconciliation
description: Match vendor statements against ledger entries for the period ending Sep 30.

title: Pre-audit Checklist
description: Complete the pre-audit checklist for the upcoming external audit.

title: Monthly Ledger Review
description: Review the recent transactions and update handoff status.

title: Client Fee Adjustments
description: Apply approved fee adjustments for client accounts ending 8801-8810.
